price: ewig und auf immer darin zu bleiben, ohne einen Schutzherrn noch Helfer zu finden.
arabic: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدٗاۖ لَّا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيّٗا وَلَا نَصِيرٗا

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: khālidīna fīhā abadan lā yajidūna waliyyan walā naṣīran
